title: The Ominous Sandwich
cover_description: Boomy stands atop a towering sandwich skyscraper, clutching a tiny knife, while cheese monsters crawl up the sides.
host_intro: Tonight, Boomy prepares a simple lunch. It is not simple.
host_outro: Boomy’s sandwich is now a monument. He is not proud.
script:
[TITLE: The Ominous Sandwich]
[HOST_INTRO: Tonight, Boomy prepares a simple lunch. It is not simple.]
[HOST_OUTRO: Boomy’s sandwich is now a monument. He is not proud.]
[AGE: 9-12]
[VOICES: comedic_villain, mysterious_witch, musical_original]
[COMEDY_TYPE: ominous_mundane]

[SETUP]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: gentle, wistful] The kitchen hums with quiet purpose. [STING: sweet_pause]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: confident, bluster] I, the Great Boomy, shall craft the most magnificent sandwich the world has ever seen. [STING: villain_entrance]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: ominous] The bread lies in wait. The knife glints. Something... is not right. [STING: witch_ominous]
[/SETUP]

[BEAT_1]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: triumphant] Behold! A single slice of cheese, placed with the precision of a thousand kings. [STING: musical_flourish]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: suspicious] The cheese... quivers. [STING: tiptoe]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: dismissive] It is merely shivering from my greatness. [STING: slide_whistle]
[/BEAT_1]

[BEAT_2]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] Why is the cheese... crawling toward the edge? [STING: mouse_panic]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: ominous, building] The sandwich... hungers. [STING: witch_dramatic]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: scrambling] I shall stop it with... another slice of bread! [STING: boing]
[/BEAT_2]

[BEAT_3]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: desperate, loud] The bread is now a tower! The cheese has formed an army! [STING: big_crash]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: deadpan] You have built a sandwich skyscraper. [STING: silence]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: stunned, quiet] ...I was just making lunch. [STING: deflation]
[/BEAT_3]

[BUTTON]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: ominous, revealing] [PUNCHLINE]The sandwich has claimed the kitchen. You are its prisoner now.[/PUNCHLINE] [STING: witch_reveal]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: deadpan] And thus, Boomy’s lunch became a legend. [STING: sweet_eyeroll]
[/BUTTON]

[COVER: Boomy stands atop a towering sandwich skyscraper, clutching a tiny knife, while cheese monsters crawl up the sides.]
[PREMISE: A sandwich becomes a monster]
